disclaimer: Evidence checklist, not a moral ranking. A check means the linked first-party material publishes that specific evidence; it does not mean the claim is independently verified or applies to every model, region, or request.

criteria.title: Energy per request
criteria.explanation: Publishes a numerical energy value for a request, prompt, or response.

criteria.title: Water per request
criteria.explanation: Publishes a numerical water-consumption value for a request, prompt, or response.

criteria.title: Method and scope
criteria.explanation: Publishes enough methodology to understand the serving-system boundary and major inclusions.

criteria.title: Lifecycle impacts
criteria.explanation: Includes upstream hardware, manufacturing, or other lifecycle impacts in the disclosed boundary.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.summary: Publishes point-in-time median Gemini text-prompt energy and water estimates with a detailed operational serving boundary. The disclosure says the claims are not independently verified and do not represent every prompt.

sources.title: Google Cloud — Measuring the environmental impact of AI inference

providers.name: Mistral AI
providers.summary: Publishes water, carbon, and resource-depletion impacts for a 400-token Le Chat response using a lifecycle assessment that includes upstream server manufacturing. It does not publish request energy in the cited release.

sources.title: Mistral AI — Contribution to a global environmental standard

providers.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
providers.summary: A first-party leadership statement publishes average ChatGPT-query energy and water numbers. The statement does not provide model, token, region, system-boundary, or reproducible methodology detail.

providers.name: Anthropic Claude
providers.summary: The reviewed first-party sustainability material describes annual operational carbon accounting and offsets, but does not publish per-request energy, per-request water, an inference boundary, or lifecycle inference impacts.

sources.title: Anthropic — Claude 3 Model Card, sustainability section
